name: BB:BehaviorDefinition: Suspicious Activity in Shell Commands
notes:
This Building Block detects suspicious shell commands used in various code exploits.

Covered from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: Florian Roth
SIGMA Title: Suspicious Activity in Shell Commands
SIGMA Description: Detects suspicious shell commands used in various exploit codes (see references)


Confidence: MEDIUM

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
bb_references: BB:BehaviorDefinition: Suspicious Activity in Shell Commands on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Linux OS
when the event category for the event is one of the following System.Process Creation Success

when the event matches ("Command" ILIKE 'wget * - http* | perl' OR "Command" ILIKE 'wget * - http* | sh' OR "Command" ILIKE 'wget * - http* | bash' OR "Command" ILIKE 'python -m SimpleHTTPServer' OR "Command" ILIKE '-m http.server' OR "Command" ILIKE 'import pty; pty.spawn*' OR "Command" ILIKE 'socat exec:*' OR "Command" ILIKE 'socat -O /tmp/*' OR "Command" ILIKE 'socat tcp-connect*' OR "Command" ILIKE '*echo binary >>*' OR "Command" ILIKE '*wget *; chmod +x*' OR "Command" ILIKE '*wget *; chmod 777 *' OR "Command" ILIKE '*cd /tmp || cd /var/run || cd /mnt*' OR "Command" ILIKE '*stop;service iptables stop;*' OR "Command" ILIKE '*stop;SuSEfirewall2 stop;*' OR "Command" ILIKE 'chmod 777 2020*' OR "Command" ILIKE '*>>/etc/rc.local' OR "Command" ILIKE '*base64 -d /tmp/*' OR "Command" ILIKE '* | base64 -d *' OR "Command" ILIKE '*/chmod u+s *' OR "Command" ILIKE '*chmod +s /tmp/*' OR "Command" ILIKE '*chmod u+s /tmp/*' OR "Command" ILIKE '* /tmp/haxhax*' OR "Command" ILIKE '* /tmp/ns_sploit*' OR "Command" ILIKE 'nc -l -p *' OR "Command" ILIKE 'cp /bin/ksh *' OR "Command" ILIKE 'cp /bin/sh *' OR "Command" ILIKE '* /tmp/*.b64 *' OR "Command" ILIKE '*/tmp/ysocereal.jar*' OR "Command" ILIKE '*/tmp/x *' OR "Command" ILIKE '*; chmod +x /tmp/*' OR "Command" ILIKE '*;chmod +x /tmp/*') AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY BB:BehaviorDefinition: Suspicious Activity in Shell Commands on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Linux OS
AND when the event category for the event is one of the following System.Process Creation Success

AND when the event matches ("Command" ILIKE 'wget * - http* | perl' OR "Command" ILIKE 'wget * - http* | sh' OR "Command" ILIKE 'wget * - http* | bash' OR "Command" ILIKE 'python -m SimpleHTTPServer' OR "Command" ILIKE '-m http.server' OR "Command" ILIKE 'import pty; pty.spawn*' OR "Command" ILIKE 'socat exec:*' OR "Command" ILIKE 'socat -O /tmp/*' OR "Command" ILIKE 'socat tcp-connect*' OR "Command" ILIKE '*echo binary >>*' OR "Command" ILIKE '*wget *; chmod +x*' OR "Command" ILIKE '*wget *; chmod 777 *' OR "Command" ILIKE '*cd /tmp || cd /var/run || cd /mnt*' OR "Command" ILIKE '*stop;service iptables stop;*' OR "Command" ILIKE '*stop;SuSEfirewall2 stop;*' OR "Command" ILIKE 'chmod 777 2020*' OR "Command" ILIKE '*>>/etc/rc.local' OR "Command" ILIKE '*base64 -d /tmp/*' OR "Command" ILIKE '* | base64 -d *' OR "Command" ILIKE '*/chmod u+s *' OR "Command" ILIKE '*chmod +s /tmp/*' OR "Command" ILIKE '*chmod u+s /tmp/*' OR "Command" ILIKE '* /tmp/haxhax*' OR "Command" ILIKE '* /tmp/ns_sploit*' OR "Command" ILIKE 'nc -l -p *' OR "Command" ILIKE 'cp /bin/ksh *' OR "Command" ILIKE 'cp /bin/sh *' OR "Command" ILIKE '* /tmp/*.b64 *' OR "Command" ILIKE '*/tmp/ysocereal.jar*' OR "Command" ILIKE '*/tmp/x *' OR "Command" ILIKE '*; chmod +x /tmp/*' OR "Command" ILIKE '*;chmod +x /tmp/*') AQL filter query
